scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:i18n && npm run test:client
scripts.snapshots:playwright: concurrently -k -s first -n server,client,tests -c blue,green,magenta "PORT=3002 DB_PATH=$(pwd)/server/data/viking.playwright.sqlite APP_BASE_URL=http://localhost:5174 npm run dev:server" "VITE_PROXY_TARGET=http://127.0.0.1:3002 npm run dev --workspace client -- --host localhost --port 5174 --strictPort" "wait-on --timeout 60000 http-get://localhost:5174 tcp:127.0.0.1:3002 && sleep 1 && PLAYWRIGHT_DB_PATH=$(pwd)/server/data/viking.playwright.sqlite SNAPSHOT_URL=http://localhost:5174 SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3002 npx playwright test -c playwright.config.ts"
